productName: Lish Organics - Rosin Dabs - DOH - Tested - Papaya - 1g
description: Solventless indica rosin pressed from Papaya using nothing but heat and pressure, squeezing fragrant oil straight from the flower — no chemicals, ever. Expect with notes of tree fruit, tropical, and apricot, a rich terpene punch, and a heavy, relaxed body calm.
